tasks.requirement_name: Complete decomposition of feasible defense corpus
tasks.description: This task involves decomposing the feasible defense corpus into its constituent parts for further analysis or processing. It requires accessing and analyzing data related to defense strategies, threats, and mitigation techniques.

tasks.description: This task involves validating the decomposition results to ensure they meet the required standards and are accurate. It may involve cross-checking with existing data or using analytical tools.
